visual_description: The child, a young boy with blond hair wearing a striped sweater, stands in a dimly lit room holding a large knife. He looks at the blade, then turns and walks toward a bookshelf while still gripping the knife. A lamp with an orange shade illuminates a side table and a vintage television sits nearby.
